response.justification: The candidate is an accomplished senior full-stack/web engineer with strong software craftsmanship, but the role requires deep hardware-adjacent expertise — SoC/IP modeling, AI accelerator performance analysis, and hardware-software co-design — none of which appears in the resume. The closest relevant experience is low-latency DLang systems work and some C/C++ tooling at National Instruments, which falls well short of the principal-level architecture, GPU/SIMD, and deep-learning workload optimization background this position demands.
strengths: 13+ years of software engineering experience with a BS in Computer Science, satisfying the formal experience bar
Low-latency, high-throughput systems experience (DLang async I/O services handling millions of requests/sec)
Strong engineering fundamentals: TDD, CI/CD, open-source contributions, and community teaching
concerns: No SoC/IP modeling, silicon architecture, or hardware-software co-design experience
No deep-learning workload, GPU architecture, or SIMD/MIMD optimization background
Career trajectory is web/product engineering, not performance architecture at principal IC level

key_factors.factor: Solid systems programming and low-latency experience
